channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 20th April
item.description:
Give and take 28day please reset x1 lose rocking gully frame 530 x380x50mm stats required (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 20th April
item.description:
Broken Chamber CW Road Closure TM CLEAN AND INVESTIGATE Stats required (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wide pothole on narrow single track road which required repair - as dangerous on a single track road, 20th April
item.description:
Outside residential property on the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Main Street, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 20th April
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day carriage way pothole approx 400x400x40mm (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 20th April
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day carriage way pothole approx 3000x1200x50mm (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 20th April
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 20th April
item.description:

item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 20th April
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 20th April
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure 28 day please lift and replace x1 rocking broken raised 900x600x20mm slabs (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 20th April
item.description:

item.description:
